en_title: After Star Fox's Launch and Zelda: Ocarina of Time's Announcement, Miyamoto Defends Nintendo's Recent Spate of Remakes and Says They Lead to 'Future Developments'
cn_title: 任天堂重制《星际火狐》和《塞尔达传说 时之笛》，宫本茂：可引向未来开发
subtitle: 重制通向未来

paragraphs.en: Nintendo legend Shigeru Miyamoto has defended the company's remakes, and said that newer versions of classic titles can lead to "future developments" — something that fans are keen to see for Star Fox and Zelda.
paragraphs.cn: 任天堂传奇人物宫本茂为公司的重制作品辩护，并表示经典游戏的新版本可以引向「未来开发」——《星际火狐》和《塞尔达传说》的粉丝都十分期待看到这种发展。

paragraphs.en: While Nintendo remaking and re-releasing its classic games is absolutely nothing new, it's fair to point out that two of the company's biggest Switch 2 games this year will be very familiar to long-term fans. Star Fox , which launched last month, sparked conversation online for technically being the company's third reimaging of its N64 classic . The upcoming Switch 2 incarnation of The Legend of Zelda: Ocarina of Time , meanwhile, will follow various re-releases of the N64 original, as well as its 3DS port.
paragraphs.cn: 任天堂重制并重新发行经典游戏早已不是新鲜事，不过公司今年两款最重要的Switch 2游戏，确实会让老玩家感到非常熟悉。上月推出的《星际火狐》严格来说已是任天堂第三次重新诠释这款N64经典作品，因此在网上引发讨论。即将登陆Switch 2的《塞尔达传说：时之笛》则是在N64原版多次再版以及3DS移植版之后推出的又一版本。

paragraphs.en: Now, speaking to Japanese gaming magazine Famitsu (via Nintendo Everything ), Miyamoto has addressed the claim that there are too many Nintendo remakes — and hinted that the projects will subsequently serve as the basis for something new.
paragraphs.cn: 如今，宫本茂在接受日本游戏杂志《Fami通》采访时（经Nintendo Everything转述），回应了任天堂重制作品过多的说法，并暗示这些项目今后将成为某些新事物的基础。

paragraphs.en: "Some people might say there are a lot of remakes, but after five years, a lot of people have outgrown games and stop playing them," Miyamoto said. "Young people today don't have the opportunity to play games from 10 years ago, so remaking them to be more playable and releasing them again is a good way to meet the demand.
paragraphs.cn: 宫本茂说道：「有些人可能会说重制作品很多，但五年过去，许多人已经不再适合或不再游玩那些游戏。如今的年轻人没有机会接触10年前的作品，所以把它们重制得更易于游玩并再次发行，是满足需求的好办法。」

paragraphs.en: "Letting people know the original games also leads to future developments," he teased, "so we've been actively pursuing that recently."
paragraphs.cn: 他接着卖了个关子：「让人们了解原作也会引向未来的开发，因此我们最近一直在积极推进这件事。」

paragraphs.en: Following the appearance of Fox McCloud in this year's Super Mario Galaxy Movie, as well as the Switch 2's Star Fox remake, many fans expect an all-new Star Fox game to follow in due course. As for Zelda, it is inevitable that a full-blown follow-up to Tears of the Kingdom is in the works, while Ocarina of Time launches later this year to keep fans busy.
paragraphs.cn: 随着Fox McCloud在今年的《超级马力欧银河大电影》中亮相，以及Switch 2版《星际火狐》重制作品推出，许多粉丝期待一款全新的《星际火狐》游戏随后到来。至于《塞尔达传说》，《王国之泪》的完整续作正在开发几乎是必然的，而《时之笛》将在今年晚些时候推出，让粉丝在等待期间有内容可玩。

paragraphs.en: After a major leak and much fan speculation, Nintendo finally confirmed it was remaking Ocarina of Time during last month's major Nintendo Direct . An initial teaser revealed little, though showed the game's 3D art style and confirmed it will launch sometime later in 2026. However, a now-removed product description has hinted that the game will likely be a faithful remake .
paragraphs.cn: 在一次重大泄露和大量粉丝猜测之后，任天堂终于在上月的大型Nintendo Direct中确认正在重制《时之笛》。首支预告透露的信息不多，但展示了游戏的3D美术风格，并确认作品将在2026年晚些时候发售。不过，一段现已删除的商品描述暗示，本作很可能会忠实重现原版。

summary: 宫本茂表示，重制经典游戏既能让年轻玩家接触旧作，也能引向「未来开发」。随着Switch 2版《星际火狐》推出和《塞尔达传说 时之笛》重制版公布，粉丝期待这些项目为全新作品铺路。
opus_summary: 宫本茂认为重制并非只是在消费情怀：经典作品重新面世，既能让年轻玩家补上过去错过的体验，也可能成为任天堂探索全新作品和未来开发方向的重要基础。
